title: Golden Set Row
description: One labeled (transcript_id, field) row in a MEDDPICC eval golden set.

transcript_id.description: Stable identifier for the source call/transcript. Multiple rows may share a transcript_id.

field.description: MEDDPICC field name. The valid set is configuration-driven (thresholds.yaml), not hard-coded here.

gold_value.description: The labeled correct value, or null if the call genuinely does not support an extraction.

gold_confidence.description: Labeler confidence in the gold value. 'none' = labeler uncertain; excluded from calibration but included in recall.

gold_evidence_quote.description: Verbatim transcript span supporting the label. MUST be null when gold_value is null.

edge_case_tag.description: Optional free-form tag naming the failure mode this row tests (e.g., 'champion_not_eb', 'status_quo_competitor').
